systems.name: OpenCode Runtime
systems.description: Primary runtime that hosts sessions, tools, workers, and UI synchronization.

containers.name: Session Runtime
containers.description: Backend runtime that executes orchestrator sessions and task workers.

containers.name: Session UI
containers.description: Web/TUI surfaces that display parent and child session activity.

components.name: Task Tool Dispatcher
components.description: Creates child sessions, launches workers, and returns immediate dispatch metadata.

components.name: Task Completion Subscriber
components.description: Consumes worker completion events and converts them into parent-session continuation actions.

components.name: Session Continuation Queue
components.description: Schedules resumed parent orchestrator execution after task completion messages are injected.

components.name: Subagent Activity Surface
components.description: Displays running/completed subagent activity to the user while the parent turn is no longer blocked.

relationships.description: Bridged worker lifecycle events become completion inputs.
Completion subscriber enqueues the parent session after synthetic message injection.
Resumed orchestrator execution may dispatch the next task through the tool layer.
Dispatch metadata and bridged child-session activity are reflected in user-facing activity views.
